title: Wynncraft: Donjons
description: Modernises Dungeon, Raid, and GUI elements for Wynncraft
body:
Hi HI!

Wynncraft's Dungeon rewards, and to a lesser extent Raid rewards, have always felt a little...underwhelming. So, I present...

### The Wynncraft Donjons Resource Pack

The pack aims to retexture, and in some cases remodel, Dungeon and Raid rewards in Wynncraft. It will also come with minor tweaks of the GUI elements to modernise them.

---

### Versions

The pack requires mods to function.

The more recent updates of the pack have split it into two versions: CITR and OF. CITR stands for [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn/versions), and OF stands for [Optifine](https://optifine.net), each intended for their respective mod. Optifine can be ran as a standalone or with [Forge](https://files.minecraftforge.net/net/minecraftforge/forge/), but CITR requires [Fabric](https://fabricmc.net/). The pack is intended to work with Minecraft versions 1.17-1.20.2, but could possibly work with earlier versions.

---

### Policies

This pack is not to be redistributed on any third-party sites. If you would like to share the pack, use:

[https://forums.wynncraft.com/threads/wynncraft-donjons-resource-pack.311610/]

&

[modrinth]

Assets in this pack are under no conditions allowed to be repurposed for other projects. The only conditions in which you may use these assets outside of the designated pack are:

If your project is for strictly personal and/or private use only, and will not be redistributed, or
If you have explicit permission from me, Rythew To contact me, please find me on Discord with the handle: `rythew`
I am not officially associated with Wynncraft, and I am not staff nor am paid by Wynncraft.

---

### Closing Notes

Please see the Gallery for a handful of my personal favourites. This pack is intended to be used for the Wynncraft server only. I hope that you like it, and, if would like to, leave a comment here, on the Wynncraft Forums, or DM me on Discord.

---
